BlackGapless.hint: Whether there shouldn't be gaps between child blocks on this document's sheet.
BlackGapless.label: Child Block Gapless

BlockSize.hint: Size that child blocks will be displayed at on this document's sheet.
BlockSize.label: Child Block Size

Competence.hint: If this is proficient or fluent.
Competence.label: Competence

enabled.hint: Whether this effect causes a transformation. Note that this isn't just for "transformation effects," but for any case in which another species' stats should be applied (such as animating as an undead).
enabled.label: Causes Transformation

img.hint: An image for transformed token art. Consequence transformation images are prioritized over species. This only applies if token art is overridden.
img.label: Token Image

level.hint: How strong of a transformation this is.
level.label: Transformation Level

override.hint: Aspects of the actor and its token that should be overridden by this transformation.
override.label: Override

reset.hint: Stats that should be reset by this transformation.
reset.label: Reset

ring.hint: Whether this transformation has a token ring or not. Consequence transformation rings are prioritized over species. This only applies if token art is overridden.
ring.label: Token Ring

suppress.hint: Types of documents this should turn off if they're not provided by the transformation.
suppress.label: Suppress

uuids.hint: The species this transforms the target into.
uuids.itemHint: A specific species this transforms the target into.
uuids.label: Species
uuids.validationError: Only species can be transformed into.
